session.user: Run prettier --check on these files and report results: - docs/learned/architecture/checked-out-branch-handling.md - docs/learned/cli/command-promotion.md - docs/learned/cli/rich-table-output.md - docs/learned/planning/incremental-dispatch.md - docs/learned/tui/filter-toggle-pattern.md - docs/learned/textual/quirks.md

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting on 6 documentation files

prettier passed: All 6 documentation files conform to Prettier code style.
